unit.note: server vitest 173 files / 2018 passed + 1 skipped (SHIPWRIGHT_NETWORK_PROFILE=local). D22 adds title-validation.test.ts (13 tests): create newline (LF/CR/CRLF) + over-length reject (RED-first on pre-fix), create valid + blank-default, fork newline/CRLF/over-length reject with no-orphan-row (RED-first), fork valid emits commands + blank-default, PATCH newline/over-length parity. Production touched: create.ts + lifecycle.ts (fork) + patch.ts (refactor to shared helper) + _shared/helpers.ts (new normalizeTitle). No client/** change. tsc + oxlint clean.

integration.note: title-validation.test.ts drives the REAL create/fork/patch Hono routes end-to-end through an in-memory SdkSessionsStore: POST /tasks + POST /tasks/:id/fork with foo\nbar / foo\rbar / foo\r\nbar / over-length -> 400 with the same error string PATCH gives, and store.list() proves nothing was persisted (fork proves no orphan child). Valid + blank-default paths + the fork happy-path commands emission also asserted.

e2e.note: No E2E run. D22 is a server-side write-boundary validation hardening with NO UI-observable change on the normal path: the NewTaskModal / EditableTaskTitle client paths always send trimmed single-line titles, so the browser flow is unchanged. The invalid-title path is only reachable by an automated writer (run-config phase title, triage fix-now seed, leadwright daemon), not the browser UI. Proven by deterministic server route regressions + a real-fs create->persist->reload round-trip probe. No client file changed.

surface_verification.justification: Server-side task-title validation at the create/fork write boundary (FR-01.08 create, FR-01.09 edit-parity); no UI-observable change on the normal path. The browser create/rename flows (NewTaskModal, EditableTaskTitle) always submit trimmed single-line titles, so the observable contract for a valid title is unchanged (same 200, same trimmed title, same 'Untitled task' / '<parent> - fork' default for a blank title). The defect (an automated writer persisting a newline/over-length title that then 500s every Launch/Resume, plus a fork orphan row) is reachable only via a non-browser API client. Proof is the deterministic server regressions (title-validation.test.ts, 4 RED-first on pre-fix main) plus a throwaway real-fs round-trip probe (valid Unicode+whitespace title survives persist->reload byte-identical trimmed; invalid newline title -> 400, reloaded store still 1 row, disk never carried the newline; 8/8 checks pass). No client/** file changed; the frontend-change detector reports has_frontend_changes=false.

behaviors.behavior: AC1/F27 - POST /tasks rejects a provided title with an embedded newline (CR, LF, or CRLF) with the same 'title cannot contain newlines' 400 PATCH gives, and does not persist it
behaviors.evidence: title-validation.test.ts 'POST /tasks ... 400 title cannot contain newlines' (parameterized foo\nbar / foo\rbar / foo\r\nbar) - RED on pre-fix (create trimmed + persisted 200) -> GREEN, store.list() length 0.

behaviors.behavior: AC1/F27 - POST /tasks rejects an over-length title with the same 'title exceeds N characters' 400 PATCH gives, and does not persist it
behaviors.evidence: title-validation.test.ts '400 title exceeds N characters on over-length - not persisted' - RED on pre-fix (persisted 200) -> GREEN, store.list() length 0.

behaviors.behavior: AC1/F27 - POST /tasks/:id/fork validates the title BEFORE creating the child so an invalid title leaves NO orphan child row (pre-fix normalizeTitle threw in buildCopyCommands AFTER store.create -> 500 + orphan)
behaviors.evidence: title-validation.test.ts fork newline (500->400) + fork CRLF + fork over-length (200->400) each assert store.list() length 1 (parent only). RED on pre-fix (500/200 + orphan) -> GREEN.

behaviors.behavior: AC1/F27 - a valid title still creates/forks (trimmed), a blank/absent title keeps the 'Untitled task' / '<parent> - fork' default, and a valid fork still emits launch commands (buildCopyCommands non-regression)
behaviors.evidence: title-validation.test.ts valid-create ('  Ship it  ' -> 'Ship it'), blank-create ('   ' -> 'Untitled task'), valid-fork (+ commands defined), blank-fork ('   ' -> 'parent - fork').

behaviors.behavior: AC2 - a NEW regression test is RED on pre-fix main and green after (defect actually reproduced)
behaviors.evidence: title-validation.test.ts run against unmodified source: 4 failed / 6 passed (create newline+over-length; fork newline 500+orphan; fork over-length persisted). After the fix: 13/13 green.

behaviors.behavior: AC3 - full existing server suite stays green; no invariant/ADR regressed (D01 DELETE/kill lifecycle wiring untouched; PATCH error contract preserved byte-identical)
behaviors.evidence: 173 files / 2018 passed + 1 skipped (SHIPWRIGHT_NETWORK_PROFILE=local). Existing routes.test.ts PATCH empty/ELOCKED + D01 delete-cascade guard still green; tsc + oxlint clean (no warnings in touched files).

behaviors.behavior: AC4 - files stay within footprint (shared normalizeTitle in _shared/helpers.ts + a new cohesive title-validation.test.ts per the campaign guardrail) and bloat baselines are not ratcheted
behaviors.evidence: create.ts 179<300, lifecycle.ts 253<300, patch.ts 224<300 (net -11 via helper reuse), helpers.ts 245<300, title-validation.test.ts 231<300. New test file chosen because routes.test.ts is at 298 LOC (adding tests crosses the 300 ceiling = new bloat crossing). None of the touched files are baselined; no ratchet.

behaviors.behavior: Confidence calibration (medium + touches_io_boundary) - real-fs create->persist->reload round-trip: a valid title survives byte-identical (trimmed), an invalid title never lands on disk (no orphan)
behaviors.evidence: Throwaway node probe over built dist: valid 'Round Trip Unicode' title -> real disk persist -> reload -> title byte-identical + disk JSON has no newline in the title field; invalid 'evil\ntitle' -> 400 -> reloaded store still 1 row + disk never contained it. 8/8 checks pass; two consecutive clean probe rounds -> asymptote reached.

test_completeness.note: 4 ACs (AC1-AC4) from the sub-iterate spec: AC1 split across create-newline / create-over-length / fork-no-orphan / valid+default (4 behaviors), AC2 RED-first, AC3 full-suite, AC4 footprint+bloat, plus the medium/io-boundary calibration probe. Each AC1 facet maps to >=1 RED-first regression in title-validation.test.ts; the create/fork validation reuses the single normalizeTitle source of truth PATCH consumes.
